explanation: This command uses the insecure proxy flag (--proxy-insecure) and a proxy server, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. It is a valid test command for verifying detection.
This command uses the insecure DOH flag (--doh-insecure), which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. It is a valid test command for verifying detection.
This command uses quotes around the proxy URL as an insertion mutation, but it still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria for --proxy-insecure.
